## LibraryRuntime.Confection.create() method

Factory method that auto-detects confection type and returns appropriate concrete class.

**Signature:**

```typescript
static create(context: IConfectionContext, id: ConfectionId, confection: Confections.AnyConfectionEntity): Result<AnyConfection>;
```
